name: wmkf_app_grant_cycle
description: Grant review cycles backing the Reviewer Finder. One row per fiscal-year board meeting cycle. Alt-keyed on fiscal year code so it joins to akoya_request.akoya_fiscalyear.

primaryNameAttribute.description: Human-readable cycle name, e.g. 'June 2026 Board Meeting'.

attributes.description: Compact cycle code (e.g. 'J26', 'D27') generated from meeting date via cycle-code.js. Alternate key — joins to wmkf_appreviewersuggestion.wmkf_grantcyclecode and is the stable identifier surfaced in URLs and preferences. Patched into the deployed entity 2026-05-12 (W3 preflight).

Friendly program label per cycle (e.g. 'W. M. Keck Foundation'). Used in outgoing reviewer emails. Patched 2026-05-12. Note: Postgres source is VARCHAR(255); Dataverse maxLength=100 is a deliberate accept — all 13 prod rows are 21 chars ('W. M. Keck Foundation') and the foundation name isn't going to grow past 100. Widen if a multi-foundation future arrives.

JSON-as-text bag of per-cycle template variables (proposalDueDate, honorarium, proposalSendDate, commitDate, etc.) consumed by render-emails.js. Maps from Postgres grant_cycles.custom_fields JSONB. Patched 2026-05-12.
Denormalized copy of the board-meeting date for requests in this cycle.
Max page count for reviewer summaries (e.g. '2').
Date by which reviewers must submit their reviews.
Vercel Blob URL of the review template attached to outgoing emails.
JSON array of additional attachment {blobUrl,filename} objects.
Whether the cycle should appear in the active picker.
